prompt: Total float = LS − ES. Tap the only activity that is NOT on the critical path.

figure.caption: Each box: ES|EF (top), LS|LF (bottom).

regions.label: A
regions.why: 0 float (LS = ES) — on the critical path.

regions.label: C
regions.why: LS 6 ≠ ES 3 → 3 days of float, so C can slip without delaying the project.

explanation: The critical path A→B→D has zero float. Activity C has 3 days of total float (LS 6 vs ES 3), so it sits off the critical path.

prompt: This control chart plots a process over time. Tap the point that signals the process is out of control.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 190' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><line x1='40' y1='30' x2='300' y2='30' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='1.3' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='40' y1='150' x2='300' y2='150' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='1.3' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='40' y1='90' x2='300' y2='90' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.3'/><polyline points='55,96 95,76 135,100 175,72 215,98 244,22 285,84' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='55' cy='96' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='95' cy='76' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='135' cy='100' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='175' cy='72' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='215' cy='98' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='244' cy='22' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><circle cx='285' cy='84' r='3.5' fill='#1F5FA8'/><text x='304' y='30' fill='#B5462F' font-size='10' text-anchor='end'>UCL</text><text x='304' y='150' fill='#B5462F' font-size='10' text-anchor='end'>LCL</text><text x='304' y='88' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='end'>mean</text></svg>
figure.caption: UCL/LCL are the dashed control limits; the solid line is the mean.

regions.why: This point is beyond the upper control limit — an out-of-control, special-cause signal.

explanation: A process is out of control when a point falls outside the control limits (or shows a non-random run). Only the sixth point breaches the UCL.

prompt: In this RACI chart, tap the cell showing who is Accountable for the Charter.

figure.caption: R responsible · A accountable · C consulted · I informed.

regions.label: Sponsor
regions.why: A — Accountable for the Charter. There's exactly one A per row.

explanation: In RACI, A = Accountable, and there is exactly one A per row. For the Charter, the Sponsor holds the A.
